zh.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL是Beatrix de ROSOY的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL是Beatrix de ROSOY的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BLONDEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 Huguenot: nickname, relationship name; French Blondel, with the same etymology as English Blundell .

variants.name: Blundell
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): from Old French blondel, a diminutive of blond ‘blond, fair’, used for someone with fair hair or a fair complexion and also used as a personal name. Compare Blunt .

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL was born as the son of Beatrix de ROSOY. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL est né, fils de Beatrix de ROSOY. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL wurde, als Sohn von Beatrix de ROSOY geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL è nato il come figlio di Beatrix de ROSOY. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDELはBeatrix de ROSOYの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL(은)는 Beatrix de ROSOY의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL nasceu filho de Beatrix de ROSOY. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL родился. Его мать звали Beatrix de ROSOY. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Baudouin de BLONDEL nació como hijo de Beatrix de ROSOY. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
